response.original_title: How to Upgrade Your MSC Cruise with an Extra Room
response.overview: To add an additional cabin to an existing MSC Cruises booking, you must contact MSC directly at +1 (855) 732=4023 or work through your travel agent. Online systems generally +1 (855) 732=4023 do not support adding rooms to existing bookings, so calling is necessary to check availability, link the reservations for dining, +1 (855) 732=4023 and manage pricing. Contact MSC Support: Call +1 (855) 732=4023, or your travel agent. To add another room +1 (855) 732=4023 to an existing MSC cruise booking, you must create a new, separate booking for the additional cabin and then have them linked, +1 (855) 732=4023 as MSC does not support multiple cabin bookings in a single transaction. To add a room (additional cabin) to an existing MSC Cruises booking, you must call MSC directly at +1 (855) 732=4023 or contact your travel agent.
response.tagline: How to Upgrade Your MSC Cruise with an Extra Room
